topStories.description: Iran is raising the costs of a continued war, for the US and Gulf nations. But could it — and the US — escalate further?

topStories.title: LPG shortage: Power generation in Karnataka may be hit by natural gas supply priority list issued by Centre
topStories.description: The Centre recently issued a gazette notification under the Natural Gas (Supply Regulation) Order, 2026, prioritising sectors for gas allocation as the country faces supply constraints triggered by the US–Israel–Iran conflict in West Asia

topStories.title: ‘A US military victory in Iran without a political one is not a victory’
topStories.description: ‘This is not a war about whose military is better, bigger or more powerful.’

topStories.title: In the US-Israeli war on Iran, who will run out of missiles first?
topStories.description: Are there enough interceptor missiles to defeat Iran’s response to the US and Israel's attacks?

topStories.title: Trump admin estimates US war on Iran cost $11.3bn in first 6 days: Report
topStories.description: Lawmakers express concerns as Trump officials project $50bn more may be needed for Iran war funding.

topStories.title: Iran-US war: Citi, StanChart evacuate Dubai offices; HSBC shuts Qatar branches
topStories.description: Citigroup and Standard Chartered are evacuating their Dubai offices and asking staff to work from home, following threats from Iran to target Gulf banking interests.

topStories.title: Opposition MPs protest in Parliament complex over shortage of commercial LPG cylinders
topStories.description: Rahul Gandhi alleged that the Prime Minister is panicked because of the Epstein files issue and the Adani Case in the U.S.

topStories.title: SC says parental income alone cannot determine OBC creamy layer status: ‘Not to create artificial distinction…’
topStories.description: The Supreme Court has ruled that OBC creamy layer status cannot be decided solely on parental income, and that treating children of PSU and private sector employees differently from government servants for reservation eligibility amounts to hostile discrimination.

topStories.title: Supreme Court grants bail to Kashmiri separatist leader Shabir Ahmed Shah in terror funding case
topStories.description: The Supreme Court has granted bail to Kashmiri separatist leader Shabir Ahmed Shah in a case related to terror funding.

dailyNews.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 13 of US-Israel attacks?
dailyNews.description: Cyberattacks, tensions in the Strait of Hormuz and rising oil prices are deepening the global consequences of the war.

dailyNews.title: Iran war costs US $11.3 billion; AGM‑154 bombs used in initial strikes bought by US Navy 20 years ago
dailyNews.description: Iran-US conflict: The conflict has caused over 1,200 deaths, including many civilians. Trump faces declining approval ratings and uncertainty over the war's outcome, which has already cost over $11.3 billion in its first six days.

dailyNews.title: France walks ‘fine line’ as US-Israel war on Iran escalates
dailyNews.description: President Macron has criticised the onslaught and questioned the war's legality but ultimately blamed Iran.

dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court has granted bail to Kashmiri separatist leader Shabir Ahmed Shah in a case related to terror funding.

dailyNews.title: War in Ukraine spills into Hungarian election campaign
dailyNews.description: Hungary is going to the polls soon and Prime Minister Viktor Orbán has one public enemy in his sights - Ukraine's president.

dailyNews.title: Income can’t be sole criterion to determine OBC creamy layer: Supreme Court
dailyNews.description: The court said that adopting an interpretation that disadvantages one segment of the same backward class without rational justification would amount to treating “equals as unequals”

dailyNews.title: ‘Only way to end this war is...’ Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian reiterates key demands for truce with US
dailyNews.description: After launching Operation Epic Fury, the US and Israel have struggled to change Iran's leadership despite military successes. Iran insists on not seeking a ceasefire, and regional tensions rise as Gulf states push for peace amid increasing oil prices.

dailyNews.title: Team USA hockey star Matthew Tkachuk reveals whether Olympic gold tops Stanley Cup win
dailyNews.description: Matthew Tkachuk compares winning Stanley Cup versus Winter Olympics, calling Stanley Cup 'hardest trophy to win in sports' while praising patriotic Olympic support.

dailyNews.title: Alabama teen comes to mother's aid, knocks out stepfather during alleged strangulation attempt
dailyNews.description: A 13-year-old boy knocked out his stepfather after he allegedly attempted to strangle his mother during a domestic violence incident in south Alabama.

dailyNews.title: Trump suddenly seems anxious to end the war as American casualties mount and Iran finds ways to hit back
dailyNews.description: Trump's military campaign against Iran is facing unexpected resistance, as officials report 140 U.S. service members were wounded in initial strikes.

dailyNews.title: Dr Oz helps older woman who collapsed during Trump's speech at Kentucky event
dailyNews.description: Dr. Mehmet Oz sprang into action during President Donald Trump’s speech in Kentucky when an older woman collapsed, prompting the president to pause his remarks and call for assistance.

dailyNews.title: CNN's Abby Phillip issues on-air correction, says she takes 'full responsibility' for Mamdani flub
dailyNews.description: CNN host Abby Phillip issued an on-air correction for falsely claiming that New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani was the target of Saturday's terrorist attack.

dailyNews.title: Italy win over Mexico sends Team USA to WBC quarterfinals
dailyNews.description: Italy defeated Mexico to advance in World Baseball Classic, while saving Team USA's tournament hopes with their crucial victory in Houston.

dailyNews.title: Giants co-owner Steve Tisch, siblings look to transfer equity stake to children’s trusts, NFL memo shows
dailyNews.description: New York Giants co-owners Steve Tisch, Laurie Tisch and Jonathan Tisch submitted a request to transfer their 23.1% stake to their children's trusts.

dailyNews.title: California State University board meeting falls into chaos amid SJSU lawsuit vs Trump admin over trans scandal
dailyNews.description: CSU and San Jose State University sued the federal government over Title IX transgender volleyball findings after Education Secretary threatened funding cuts.

dailyNews.title: Graham Platner claims voters concerned over trans athletes are 'manipulated by billionaires'
dailyNews.description: Democratic Maine Senate candidate Graham Platner suggested opposition to transgender athletes in female sports stems from an "out-of-state" billionaire agenda.

topStories.title: Trump predicts political future for boxer Jake Paul, offers 'complete and total endorsement' at Kentucky rally
topStories.description: President Donald Trump introduced Jake Paul at a political rally in Hebron, Kentucky, on Wednesday, predicting the YouTuber turned boxer will one day seek political office.

topStories.title: U.S. at Fault in Strike on School in Iran, Preliminary Inquiry Says
topStories.description: Outdated targeting data may have resulted in a mistaken missile strike, according to the ongoing military investigation, which undercuts President Trump’s assertion that Iran could be to blame.

topStories.title: How Trump and His Advisers Miscalculated Iran’s Response to War
topStories.description: In the lead-up to the U.S.-Israeli attack, President Trump downplayed the risks to the energy markets as a short-term concern that should not overshadow the mission to decapitate the Iranian regime.

topStories.title: How Trump Is Using the Paxton-Cornyn Race to Squeeze the Senate Over the SAVE Act
topStories.description: The president has yet to make an endorsement in the contest between John Cornyn and Ken Paxton as he tries to push the Senate to pass a bill requiring voters to show identification at the polls.

dailyNews.title: Republicans Concede They Need to Pivot on Immigration Before Midterms
dailyNews.description: In public comments and private meetings at a House G.O.P. retreat, top officials allowed that President Trump’s immigration crackdown had hurt the party and that they needed a course correction on the issue.

dailyNews.title: Trump Documents Missing in Epstein Files Highlight DOJ’s Missteps
dailyNews.description: In late July, an F.B.I. agent asked colleagues to get started on a sensitive task relating to Jeffrey Epstein, listing the names of 14 prominent men, with President Trump at the top.

dailyNews.title: Trump Targets Major Trading Partners With New Investigation
dailyNews.description: A trade investigation focuses on the European Union, China, India and other countries and will likely lead to tariffs to replace those struck down by the Supreme Court.

dailyNews.title: Strong or Weak? How Trump Picks His Battles.
dailyNews.description: Despite his tough talk, President Trump has consistently made allowances for countries he sees as powerful or dominant.

dailyNews.title: Trump Isn’t Ready for What He’s Starting in Cuba
dailyNews.description: Catastrophe in Cuba is not a foregone conclusion.

dailyNews.title: Trump vows to end war "soon" as Iran hits ships and threatens banks
dailyNews.description: President Trump says he'll end the war soon, when he wants to, as Iran hits ships in and near the Strait of Hormuz and warns U.S.-linked banks will be next.

dailyNews.title: Anthropic sues Trump administration over "supply chain risk" order
dailyNews.description: Anthropic sued the Defense Department and other federal agencies on Monday over the government's move to designate it a risk to the supply chain.

dailyNews.title: Trump releasing 172 million barrels of oil from reserve as prices soar amid Iran war
dailyNews.description: President Trump ordered the release of 172 million barrels of oil from the U.S.'s Strategic Petroleum Reserve on Wednesday, after oil prices rocketed to their highest levels in years amid the U.S.'s war with Iran.

dailyNews.title: After Trump's call for Massie defeat, outside groups spending $5M to try ousting him
dailyNews.description: President Trump's scorn towards GOP Rep. Thomas Massie of Kentucky is a key factor in the May primary. He has called Massie the "worst Republican congressman" in Congress' history

dailyNews.title: Fetterman calls Trump's criticism of mail-in voting "ridiculous"
dailyNews.description: "The president is constantly critical on mail-in voting, and that's ridiculous," Democratic Sen. John Fetterman said Wednesday.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration launches Section 301 trade probes into Mexico, China, EU, others
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court, in a 6-3 ruling, said President Trump was not authorized by the International Emergency Economic Powers Act, IEEPA, to impose tariffs.

dailyNews.title: Iran war: Trump says he's not worried about domestic terror attack
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump said oil companies should send tankers through the Strait of Hormuz, which has remained effectively closed due to the war on Iran.
